options.name: --account
options.description: Select the account to execute the command by account shorthand, sign-in address, account ID, or user ID. For a list of available accounts, run 'op account list'. Can be set as the OP_ACCOUNT environment variable

options.name: --cache
options.description: Store and use cached information

options.name: --config
options.description: Use this configuration directory

options.name: --debug
options.description: Output debug logs. Can also be set using $OP_DEBUG environment variable

options.name: --encoding
options.description: Use this character encoding type. Default: UTF-8. Supported: SHIFT_JIS, gbk

options.name: --format
options.description: Use this output format. Can be 'human-readable' or 'json'. Can be set as the OP_FORMAT environment variable. (default "human-readable")

name: -h
--help
options.description: Get help for op

options.name: --iso-timestamps
options.description: Format timestamps according to ISO 8601 / RFC 3339. Can be set as the OP_ISO_TIMESTAMPS environment variable

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Print output without color

options.name: --session
options.description: Authenticate with this session token. 1Password CLI outputs session tokens for successful 'op signin' commands when biometric unlock is disabled

name: -v
--version
options.description: Version for op

options.description: The sign-in address for your account

options.description: The email address associated with your account

options.name: --raw
options.description: Only return the session token

options.name: --shorthand
options.description: Set the short account name

ls

subcommands.description: Remove a 1Password account from this device

options.description: Forget all authenticated accounts

name: -f
--force
options.description: Do not prompt for confirmation

options.name: --category
options.description: Set the item's category

options.description: Perform a dry run of the command and output a preview of the resulting item

options.description: Give the item a randomly generated password

options.name: --tags
options.description: Set the tags to the specified (comma-separated) values

options.name: --template
options.description: Specify the filepath to read an item template from

options.name: --title
options.description: Set the item's title

options.name: --url
options.description: Set the URL associated with the item

options.name: --fields
options.description: Only return data from these fields. Use 'label=' to get the field by name or 'type=' to filter fields by type

options.name: --include-archive
options.description: Include items in the Archive. Can also be set using OP_INCLUDE_ARCHIVE environment variable

options.name: --otp

options.name: --share-link
options.description: Get a shareable link for the item

options.name: --archive
options.description: Move the item to the Archive

options.name: --categories
options.description: Only list items in these categories (comma-separated)

options.name: --include-archive
options.description: Include items in the Archive. Can also be set using OP_INCLUDE_ARCHIVE environment variable

options.name: --long
options.description: Output a more detailed item list

options.name: --tags
options.description: Only list items with these tags (comma-separated)

options.name: --emails
options.description: Email addresses to share with

options.name: --expiry
options.description: Link expiring after the specified duration in (s)econds, (m)inutes, or (h)ours (default 7h)

options.name: --vault
options.description: Look for the item in this vault
